{{Quote|An ambush! Your double-crossing lekku will adorn my wall, Squik!|[[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] thug|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Squik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who was selling merchandise to a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] thug and his cronies on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. When [[Meetra Surik]] accidentally entered the fray, Squik was [[Death/Legends|killed]] and Surik had to defend herself against the Trandoshan and his thugs.

{{Char-stub}}
